subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! An infinitely brief reply is now penned to thy detailed letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مفصل را بی نهایت مختصر جواب تحریر میگردد از بدایت سطوع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
